title: Pan-Seared Cod with Thai Stew Ingredients
description: A flavorful and spicy cod dish using Norwegian cod and rustic Thai stew ingredients. This recipe combines the freshness of the cod with the rich flavors of the stew.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Add the cod to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the rustic stew mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the brown sugar, soy sauce, fish sauce, and chili flakes to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the cod to the skillet and spoon some of the stew mixture over the top.
Serve the cod with the stew mixture spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
